allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ searchMulti\(query: \\""""matrix\\""""\) { totalResults results { id title mediaType posterPath releaseDate voteAverage } } }""""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ searchMulti\(query: \\""""inception\\""""\) { totalResults results { id title mediaType voteAverage releaseDate posterPath } } }""""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ search\(query: \\""""Inception\\""""\) { results { id title mediaType } } }""""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"":""{ search\(query: \\""Inception\\""\) { results { id title mediaType } } }""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"":""query SearchMulti\($query: String!\) { searchMulti\(query: $query\) { page totalResults results { id title mediaType } } }"", ""variables"": {""query"": ""Inception""}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"":""query { searchMulti\(query: \\""Inception\\""\) { page totalResults results { id title mediaType } } }""}')
